name: agentswarm
display_name: agentswarm — CEO orchestration for agent swarms
description: Define VP roles in a swarm.yaml, deploy each into its own tmux pane running Claude Code, and let a CEO loop monitor progress, resolve depends_on ordering, and report status. Bundles agentswarm's own MCP server, authoring/debugging skills, and the safety hooks the repo runs.
author: Naman Parikh

mcp_servers.name: agentswarm
mcp_servers.description: The repo's own MCP server: validate a swarm.yaml, read a running swarm's live status, and BM25-search agentswarm's own knowledge corpus.

skills.name: author-swarm
skills.description: Turn a multi-step goal into a correct, deployable agentswarm swarm.yaml (roles, model tiers, depends_on, completion signals).

skills.name: run-swarm
skills.description: Deploy a validated swarm.yaml and run the CEO monitoring loop to completion — validate → (sandbox-isolate untrusted) → dry-run → deploy → status → done.

skills.name: debug-swarm
skills.description: Diagnose a swarm that is stuck, idle, deadlocked, or never finishing — walk the config → signal → dependency → idle failure tree and name the exact fix.

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate the agentswarm setup / a swarm.yaml config.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show the status of a running swarm or the repo.

hooks.description: Block catastrophic / high-risk shell commands before they execute.
Block reads/edits/writes that would expose .env / credential files.
Append every state-changing tool call to .claude/audit.jsonl.

tools.name: validate_swarm
tools.description: Parse and schema-validate a swarm.yaml; returns valid:true/false plus the VP roster (role, model, depends_on).
tools.when_to_use: Before deploying a swarm, or whenever you want to confirm a config is well-formed without touching tmux.

tools.name: swarm_status
tools.description: Read a running swarm's live state from /tmp/agentswarm-{session}-status.json.
tools.when_to_use: To check per-VP RUNNING/IDLE/DONE progress of a swarm that is currently deployed.

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: BM25-ranked search over agentswarm's own knowledge corpus (MEMORY.md, memory/, brain/, top-level docs).
tools.when_to_use: To recall a prior decision, invariant, or learning recorded in this repo's memory before acting.

install_instructions:
1. Build the package: pnpm build (produces dist/mcp-server.js).
2. Add this plugin to Claude Code: Settings → Plugins → Add local plugin → select this directory.
3. The agentswarm MCP tools (validate_swarm, swarm_status, memory_search), the author-swarm/debug-swarm skills, and the safety hooks are now available in any Claude Code session.
